[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011100000 4
1 0001010111 5
2 1110111011 8
3 1100111011 7
4 1101111111 9
5 1101111101 8
6 1101111101 8
7 1011101100 6
